title: hieracium benzianum subsp. ctenodontiforme
intro: Hieracium benzianum subsp. ctenodontiforme is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, commonly known as hawkweed, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium benzianum subsp. ctenodontiforme include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
